reasoning.research_depth: Surface-level financial advice based primarily on personal experience rather than rigorous research. Anecdotal rather than analytical.
reasoning.signal_noise: Moderate content density. Personality-driven content with some filler and repetitive messaging around frugality themes.
reasoning.originality: Recognizable personal brand but follows standard YouTube personal finance format. Real estate angle provides some differentiation.
reasoning.lasting_impact: Limited lasting value. Content tied to personal anecdotes and current market conditions. General advice is generic enough to be found elsewhere.
